tossups.question: One of Tom Sachs’s “Ten Bullets” advises “Always Be” using a technique named for this company that was invented by the janitor Andrew Kromelow. As head of this company’s Planning Unit, a woman nicknamed “Schu” brought its Parallel Bar series to a building called the “Black Rock.” This company names an organizational method in which objects are arranged at 90-degree angles on a flat surface. In 2021, Herman (*) Miller purchased this company and rebranded to add this company’s name to theirs. This company is named for the married surname of its co-founder Florence, who collaborated with Eero Saarinen to produce the Tulip Chair. For 10 points, modern office design was pioneered by what furniture company that shares its name with a synonym for “hillock”?
tossups.question_sanitized: One of Tom Sachs's "Ten Bullets" advises "Always Be" using a technique named for this company that was invented by the janitor Andrew Kromelow. As head of this company's Planning Unit, a woman nicknamed "Schu" brought its Parallel Bar series to a building called the "Black Rock." This company names an organizational method in which objects are arranged at 90-degree angles on a flat surface. In 2021, Herman (*) Miller purchased this company and rebranded to add this company's name to theirs. This company is named for the married surname of its co-founder Florence, who collaborated with Eero Saarinen to produce the Tulip Chair. For 10 points, modern office design was pioneered by what furniture company that shares its name with a synonym for "hillock"?
tossups.answer: Knoll, Inc. [accept MillerKnoll or knolling] (The “Black Rock” is the CBS Building in New York City.)
tossups.answer_sanitized: Knoll, Inc. [accept MillerKnoll or knolling] (The "Black Rock" is the CBS Building in New York City.)
